# Feature: Filter handler-ID noise from review and Help

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-17 — do not edit manually unless correcting intent -->

## Intent
Dogfood browo 0.1.6: review queue and Help still surface handler identifiers (`handleSubmit`, `onSave`, …). Expand noise heuristics so review/Help prefer labels; keep rename guidance in recommendations for boilerplate names.

## Preconditions
- `isGenericHandlerName` / ReviewQueue seed filter exist

## Happy Path
- [ ] Broader `on*` / `handle*` identifier facts excluded from default review seed
- [ ] Help actions exclude handler-identifier noise; prefer `label` / description facts
- [ ] Meaningful domain names like `submitVacationRequest` not filtered
- [ ] Unit tests for expanded heuristics + help resolver
- [ ] No browo-specific hardcodes

## Edge Cases
- [ ] Stale handler-noise facts still down-ranked if queued
- [ ] Recommendations for small boilerplate set unchanged

## Regression
- [ ] Existing review-queue-noise tests still pass
- [ ] `pnpm run verify` passes

## Assumptions
- Broad handler-pattern filter for review/Help; recommendations stay on the tight boilerplate set

| Step | Filename |
|------|----------|
| n/a | logic-only |

## Implementation Notes
- `isHandlerIdentifierNoise` — broader `onFoo`/`handleFoo` for review/Help
- `resolveHelpContext` filters noise; ranks label > description > action
- Recommendations still use tight `isGenericHandlerName` boilerplate set
